/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libhwinfo_ram.so -o ../../libhwinfo_ram.so CMakeFiles/hwinfo_ram.dir/ram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_ram.dir/apple/ram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_ram.dir/linux/ram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_ram.dir/windows/ram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_ram.dir/windows/utils/wmi_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_ram.dir/apple/utils/filesystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_ram.dir/linux/utils/filesystem.cpp.o
